function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-31T16:32:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Invoice bundle request"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_17__eur_000610__inv_0008__helios_backfill_rollout_week.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_19__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_18__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the three oldest invoices linked to Claudia.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write is final; checklist appears satisfied: attachments are files read in this run and ordered newest-first among the selected oldest three invoices, recipient matches canonical Miles email, and subject quoting is valid. Next complete workflow by deleting processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Created outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-31T16-32-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Task complete: processed next inbox item, drafted reply with correct attachments, deleted inbox file. Ready to report.
next_step.observation: Deleted processed inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md after completing requested action.

function.message: Processed the next inbound note and prepared a reply draft to Miles with the requested invoice bundle. The outbound record is `60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-31T16-32-00Z.md` addressed to `miles@novak.example`, with the three oldest invoices linked to Claudia attached (listed newest-first per outbox rule): 2026-02-17 (INV-0008), 2026-01-19 (INV-0007), 2025-12-18 (INV-0006). The inbox item was then removed.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree, AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system before task work, used inbox workflow for lowest filename, treated inbound email YAML header as canonical transport metadata, verified sender identity via cast primary_contact_email, resolved Claudia via canonical entity file, used exact invoice records for linkage, wrote outbound email record in outbox with required schema, applied mandatory newest-first attachment ordering, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical sender in inbox header (`miles@novak.example`) matched `10_entities/cast/miles.md` primary_contact_email. Request asked for oldest 3 invoices linked to Claudia; confirmed linkage via `related_entity | Claudia Reiter` in invoice records dated 2025-12-18, 2026-01-19, and 2026-02-17. Created outbound draft in `60_outbox/outbox/` per sending-email workflow with exact attachment paths, then removed processed inbox file per inbox lane rules.
completed_steps_laconic: search invoices for canonical linkage tokens
